basics.description: **Note:** Please refer to the following before installing the solution: • Review the solution [Release Notes](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/tree/master/Solutions/PRODAFT%20USTA%20-%20IoC%20Threat%20Intelligence/ReleaseNotes.md) • There may be [known issues](https://aka.ms/sentinelsolutionsknownissues) pertaining to this Solution, please refer to them before installing. The **PRODAFT USTA - IoC Threat Intelligence** solution ingests indicators of compromise (malicious URLs, malware hashes, and phishing sites) from the PRODAFT USTA platform into Microsoft Sentinel **Threat Intelligence** as STIX 2.1 indicators via the Upload STIX Objects API. Ingestion is performed by import playbooks (one per IoC feed) using a system-assigned managed identity; indicators appear in the Threat Intelligence blade and the `ThreatIntelIndicators` table with `SourceSystem == 'PRODAFT USTA'`. Includes three TI-map analytic rules that match ingested indicators against your logs, an overview workbook, and an on-demand backfill playbook for loading historical indicators. **Data Connectors:** 1, **Workbooks:** 1, **Analytic Rules:** 3, **Playbooks:** 4 [Learn more about Microsoft Sentinel](https://aka.ms/azuresentinel) | [Learn more about Solutions](https://aka.ms/azuresentinelsolutionsdoc)

metadata.hidden: Hiding location, we get it from the log analytics workspace

basics.name: workspace
basics.label: Workspace
basics.toolTip: This dropdown will list only workspace that exists in the Resource Group selected

options.text: This Solution installs the data connector for PRODAFT USTA - IoC Threat Intelligence. You can get PRODAFT USTA - IoC Threat Intelligence custom log data in your Microsoft Sentinel workspace. After installing the solution, configure and enable this data connector by following guidance in Manage solution view.

link.label: Learn more about connecting data sources

options.text: This solution installs workbook(s) to help you gain insights into the telemetry collected in Microsoft Sentinel. After installing the solution, start using the workbook in Manage solution view.

Gain insights into indicators of compromise (malicious URLs, malware hashes, and phishing sites) ingested from PRODAFT USTA IoC Threat Intelligence: indicators over time, by type, active vs expired, and confidence.
This solution installs the following analytic rule templates. After installing the solution, create and enable analytic rules in Manage solution view.

elements.name: analytic1
elements.label: PRODAFT USTA - TI map URL to Syslog

options.text:
Identifies a match in Syslog data from any malicious URL indicator ingested from PRODAFT
USTA IoC Threat Intelligence (SourceSystem "PRODAFT USTA").

elements.name: analytic2
elements.label: PRODAFT USTA - TI map Domain to DnsEvents

options.text:
Identifies a match in DnsEvents from any domain-name indicator ingested from PRODAFT USTA
IoC Threat Intelligence (SourceSystem "PRODAFT USTA").

elements.name: analytic3
elements.label: PRODAFT USTA - TI map File Hash to CommonSecurityLog

options.text:
Identifies a match in CommonSecurityLog data from any file-hash indicator ingested from
PRODAFT USTA IoC Threat Intelligence (SourceSystem "PRODAFT USTA").

This solution installs the PRODAFT USTA IoC import playbooks (one per feed) and an on-demand backfill playbook. After installing the solution, deploy and authorize them from the Manage solution view; each uses a system-assigned managed identity that must be granted Microsoft Sentinel Contributor on the workspace.
